description: This Python source file implements data access layer functions for product management in a DynamoDB database, including CRUD operations and multi-threaded retrieval of products for a tenant.

classes.name: Product
classes.description: Data model class representing a product with attributes like shardId, productId, sku, name, price, and category.

methods.name: get_product
methods.description: Retrieves a product from DynamoDB based on a composite key, returning a Product object.

methods.name: delete_product
methods.description: Deletes a product from DynamoDB based on a composite key.

methods.name: create_product
methods.description: Creates a new product entry in DynamoDB with a generated shardId and productId.

methods.name: update_product
methods.description: Updates an existing product in DynamoDB with new attribute values.

methods.name: get_products
methods.description: Retrieves all products for a given tenant by querying multiple DynamoDB partitions concurrently.
